name: aet-eaw-edit
displayName: Alamo Engine Tools - Empire at War Edit
description: A LSP server for modding the game Star Wars: Empire at War and its expansion Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption

commands.title: EaWEdit: Initialise Localisation Project from Baseline

configuration.title: Alamo Engine Tools - Empire at War Edit

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.enabled.markdownDescription: Enables the Empire at War specific LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.executable.markdownDescription:
The path to the LSP server binary.

- **Self-contained release** (`.exe` on Windows, no extension on Linux): point directly at the executable.
- **Framework-dependent build** (`.dll`): point at the DLL — `dotnet` will be used to launch it.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.enabled#` is set to `true` and `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.devMode.enabled#` is `false`.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.locale.markdownDescription:
Language locale used for hover text and diagnostics.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.enabled#` is set to `true`.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.modPaths.markdownDescription:
Additional directories containing mod files to index alongside the workspace.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.enabled#` is set to `true`.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.source.baseline.type.markdownDescription:
Where to load the EaW baseline index from. Use `http` to download automatically; `local` to point at a file; `none` to disable baseline loading.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.enabled#` is set to `true`.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.source.baseline.localPa.markdownDescription:
Path to a local baseline `.aet` file.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.source.baseline.type#` is `local`.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.source.baseline.url.markdownDescription:
Custom HTTP URL for the baseline `.aet` file. Leave empty to use the default source.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.source.baseline.type#` is `http`.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.schema.source.markdownDescription:
Where to load the EaW XML schema from. Use `http` to fetch from GitHub (default); use `local` to point at a local copy.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.enabled#` is set to `true`.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.schema.url.markdownDescription:
Custom HTTP URL for the EaW XML schema index. Leave empty to use the default GitHub source.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.schema.source#` is `http`.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.schema.localPath.markdownDescription:
Path to the local EaW XML schema directory (`schema/eaw/`).

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.schema.source#` is `local`.

aet-eaw-edit.localisation.format.markdownDescription: Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.localisation.editorEnabled#` is set to `true`.
markdownEnumDescriptions:
The game's proprietary *.DAT format.

*Not recommended if the project is being worked on by multiple people.*
A comma-separated file per language. Recommended.
An XML file used by the [Empire at War Text Editor](https://www.nexusmods.com/starwarsempireatwar/mods/1859)

aet-eaw-edit.modVerify.executable.markdownDescription:
The path to the [ModVerify](https://github.com/AlamoEngine-Tools/ModVerify/releases) executable.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.modVerify.enabled#` is set to `true`.

aet-eaw-edit.modVerify.baseGameDirectory.markdownDescription: The path to the base game **Star Wars: Empire at War**'s install directory. If not provided, the extension will try to find a valid install but exit if none can be found.

aet-eaw-edit.modVerify.expansionDirector.markdownDescription: The path to the expansion pack **Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption**'s install directory. If not provided, the extension will try to find a valid install but exit if none can be found.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.devMode.enabled.markdownDescription:
Start the LSP server from source using `dotnet run --project` instead of a pre-built executable. Requires `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.devMode.projectPath#` to be set.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.enabled#` is set to `true`.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.devMode.projectPath.markdownDescription: Path to the `PG.StarWarsGame.LSP.Server.csproj` file used when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.devMode#` is enabled.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.debug.traceServer.markdownDescription:
LSP wire-protocol trace level. Set to `messages` or `verbose` to log traffic in the output panel for debugging.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.enabled#` is set to `true`.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.debug.waitForDebugger.markdownDescription:
Pass `--wait-for-debugger` to the LSP server process on startup, causing it to pause until a .NET debugger attaches.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.enabled#` is set to `true`.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
